title: Rhythm and Temporal Sophistication
objective: Elevate the rhythm system from descriptive patterns to a mathematical formalism. Introduce time signatures, duration calculus, tempo maps, and phrase-level rhythm analysis.
storyQuestions: Can we define time signatures for scene types (interrogation=4/4 syncopation, chase=accelerando 6/8)?
What function best describes the relationship between narrative gravity and shot duration?
Can rhythm patterns be composed (Breathe + Burst + Fermata)?
How should we model rhythmic memory (audience expectation from previous 5-10 shots)?
baseAcceptanceChecks: Time signature notation defined with at least 6 genre-specific signatures
Duration function f(gravity, beat_type, shot_size) formalized
Rhythm composition algebra with at least 3 operators
